title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. pedosum
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. pedosum is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae), also known as the hawkweed. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Eastern Europe, for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its medicinal properties are believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant's roots and leaves are used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
